data.title: NHPF acquires land for 158 units of affordable housing at Sloan's Lake in Colorado, marking third acquisition in 2025.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, The NHP Foundation (NHPF), a prominent national non-profit specializing in offering affordable and sustainable housing, revealed the purchase of land for their third Colorado project in 2025. This acquisition signifies a noteworthy advancement in tackling the housing needs in the region.

data.title: Gold and tech stocks are rising together, with gold up 60% in 2025 and tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 showing robust gains. Surprising 0.78 correlation recorded, highest since November 2022. The trend defies market logic, setting the stage for a possible separation soon.
data.description: Gold and tech stocks are both experiencing significant gains, with gold rising over 60% in 2025, marking its best yearly gain since 1979. The tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 is also seeing robust gains. Despite being traditionally considered a safe-haven asset and a high-risk bet respectively, the correlation between the Nasdaq 100 and gold prices has surged to 78%, the highest recorded since November 2022. This unusual correlation is unexpected, with both assets moving almost in lockstep over the past few months. Since President Donald Trump's tariff-induced market selloff in April, both gold and tech stocks have climbed by around 45%. This positive correlation is historically rare, setting the stage for a possible market break.

data.title: Nukkleus Inc. majority owner of corporate-sponsored SPAC SC II, files IPO registration with SEC on Oct 16, 2025.
data.description: Nukkleus, Inc. (NASDAQ:NUKK) revealed its majority ownership of the sponsor for the newly established SPAC, SC II Acquisition Corp. (SC II). SC II recently filed a Form S-1 registration statement with the SEC on October 16, 2025, for its upcoming IPO of units. This move signifies Nukkleus' involvement in the potential public offering.

data.title: Vera Therapeutics' ORIGIN 3 abstract to be featured at ASN Kidney Week 2025 plenary session. Major achievement for company.
data.description: Vera Therapeutics has revealed that its late-breaking abstract for ORIGIN 3 has been chosen for a prominent oral presentation at the opening plenary session of ASN Kidney Week 2025.

data.title: Founder of Blenders Eyewear, Chase Fisher, pledges $5 million to launch SDSU's largest NIL initiative, aiming to elevate athlete opportunity.
data.description: In San Diego, on October 17, 2025, Chase Fisher, the Founder of Blenders Eyewear, revealed a five-year plan aimed at enhancing athlete prospects, fostering community spirit, and establishing a higher benchmark for achievements at SDSU. As part of this initiative, Fisher pledged a personal contribution of $5 million to The organization.

data.title: American Express reports Q3 2025 revenue up 11% yoy to $18.43B, beating expectations. Adjusted EPS at $4.14 vs $4.00 expected. Stock gains traction.
data.description: American Express Co (NYSE: AXP) released its third-quarter 2025 results, outperforming analyst expectations for revenue and adjusted earnings per share. AXP stock is experiencing positive momentum. The company reported a 11% year-over-year growth in quarterly revenue (net of interest expense), reaching $18.43 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $18.05 billion. The revenue surge was fueled by robust Card Member spending, increased net interest income from growing revolving loan balances, and accelerated card fee growth. The adjusted EPS also exceeded forecasts, at $4.14 compared to the analyst estimate of $4.00. This information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nasdaq seeks SEC approval to list tokenized shares on blockchain, backed one-for-one by traditional shares. Supporters see it as maturing blockchain infrastructure, while critics question the need. Nasdaq's move represents a shift towards direct participation in crypto space.
data.description: Nasdaq has requested SEC approval to list tokenized shares on its platform, digital replicas of traditional equities recorded on a blockchain that offer advantages like around-the-clock trading and instant settlement. Each token would be backed by a physical share, maintaining the same rights. The move signifies a shift towards mainstream acceptance of blockchain technology in financial markets. While some view it as innovation, critics question the necessity given the efficiency of current equity markets. This move by Nasdaq, a traditional institution also involved in crypto trading tech, indicates a move towards direct involvement in the crypto space. Gary Gensler's more positive stance on crypto as the new SEC chairman could influence the decision.

data.title: CD Valet offers consumers a tool - October APY Checkpoint - to compare CD rates easily.#CDValet #CD #savings #APY
data.description: A company named CD Valet, based in Seattle, released its latest tool called the October APY Checkpoint on October 17, 2025. This digital marketplace serves to link customers to top CD rates and terms across the country. The APY Checkpoint is designed to provide real-time updates, allowing consumers to quickly assess the rates offered on their Certificates of Deposit (CD). Through this tool, individuals can easily compare and track the latest CD rates available.

data.title: USA Wind Farms Database 2025: 2,323 entries, 159.7 GW Onshore, 71.07 GW Offshore from ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: The "USA Wind Farms Database" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive database provides detailed information on 2,323 wind farms in the United States, encompassing both onshore and offshore projects. The cumulative capacity of the featured projects totals 159.7 GW for onshore wind energy and 71.07 GW for offshore wind energy. This resource is invaluable for professionals in the renewable energy sector seeking crucial insights into the onshore wind market.

data.title: Alliant Energy Corp declares $0.5075 per share quarterly dividend, record date Oct. 31, paid Nov. 17. Paid dividends 320 consecutive quarters since 1946.
data.description: The Board of Directors at Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) based in Madison, Wisconsin, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5075 per share. This dividend will be paid on November 17, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2025. The company has a long history of paying dividends on its common stock, with 320 consecutive quarters of payments since 1946. Alliant Energy Corporation is included in the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index, showcasing its reputation as a consistent dividend payer. Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) is a provider of energy services.
